headline: Is AI unique or just the latest tech to 'terraform' financial systems?
summary: As AI demand expands across the tech sector and has become rooted in today's market fundamentals (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC), Generative Ventures co-founder Lex Sokolin compares to previous instances of new technology "terraforming" the financial landscape.
